# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The academic report and accompanying prototype components are supported under the following versions:

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| 3.x.x | :white_check_mark: Yes |
| 2.x.x | :warning: Limited support |
| < 2.0.0 | :x: No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security and integrity of our ecosystem seriously. If you find any vulnerability or security issue in the report workspace or its related source code repositories:
